name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance in Marietta, GA offers payday and title loans at 67 North Marietta Parkway NW with extended business hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates at 67 North Marietta Parkway NW #3 in Marietta, GA as a standalone storefront serving the community. Located on a busy commercial corridor, the location offers convenient access during extended business hours: Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

This Marietta location provides fast payday loans and title loans designed for quick cash needs. The store offers title-based lending and payday advance services to Marietta residents. For details about terms, rates, or application requirements, call +1 678-369-7565 to speak with local staff.

Marietta residents seeking immediate cash typically visit for urgent bills, emergency expenses, or short-term borrowing needs. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a recent bank statement to streamline the application process. Superb Cash Advance aims for quick approval and same-day funding.
address: 67 North Marietta Pkwy NW #3, Marietta, GA 30060

company_info.headquarters: 67 North Marietta Pkwy NW #3, Marietta, GA 30060

pros: Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No credit check required; welcomes all credit types
Loan amounts up to $5,000 for online payday loans
Flexible installment payment plans available; customized to customer budgets
Minimal documentation requirements for quick approval
Positive customer reviews citing friendly staff and stress-free process
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website
High-cost short-term lending model typically results in 400%+ annualized rates
Short repayment terms (typically 2 weeks) create refinancing and debt-trap risks
Review content references Arvada locations for Atlanta storefront, suggesting data quality issues
Unsecured loans without clear disclosure of total cost of borrowing
best_for: Workers needing emergency cash within 24 hours for unexpected expenses
Consumers with poor or no credit history unable to access bank loans
Borrowers with short-term income gaps who can repay within 2–4 weeks
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for working adults facing genuine emergency cash needs who cannot access traditional bank loans and can repay within 2–4 weeks. The primary caveat: payday and cash advance loans are extremely expensive and designed as short-term solutions only; repeated borrowing creates a debt cycle. Borrowers should exhaust alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans) before using this service and must understand the true cost of borrowing before applying.
services: Installment loans with flexible payment schedules
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 67 North Marietta Parkway NW, Marietta, GA. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding.
